# Joint bias in MODEL space (joint-model), motor order FR/FL/RR/RL hip/thigh/calf.
# bias[i] = (gear_scale[i] * q_motor_measured[i]) - q_reference[i]
# Copy ONE line of 12 floats to joint_prone_bias.txt after calibration.
#
# Get values from gateway log:
#   [INFO] joint bias (joint-model space): [ ... ]
#
# Or compute: bias = "joint q after gear" - reference (see joint_prone_reference.example.txt)
#
# Below: placeholder (all zero = no extra offset). Replace with your robot's calibrated line.
